Quick summary:

- CU-001: 0.15 mg/kg at 12.4 kg → 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, PK clearance 3.2 mL/min
- CU-002: 0.12 mg/kg at 9.1 kg → 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min
- CU-003: 0.18 mg/kg at 15.7 kg → 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min

Status notes from the config:
- CU-001: stable, with 22% tumor regression at last scan
- CU-002: responding well, weight gain improving
- CU-003: new enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK model stability:
- Fact: the dosing config includes patient-specific PK clearance values and generally positive clinical notes for CU-001 and CU-002.
- Limitation: I did not run the PK models or review model diagnostics/logs, so I can’t honestly confirm overall model stability from this file alone.
- Inference: based only on this config, the current stored dosing parameters look internally consistent and there’s no obvious red flag in the patient notes.

If you want, I can also format this into a shorter clinician-facing note you can paste directly into an email or chart update.
